common.footer_about: Global logistics partner delivering precision, speed and transparency across every link of your supply chain since 1996.

index.hero_desc: Delivering reliable logistics solutions with precision, efficiency, and global reach.
index.services_desc: From air freight to last-mile delivery, we offer tailored solutions that move your business forward with precision and reliability.
index.service_air_desc: Priority air cargo solutions with time-definite delivery guarantees across 180+ destinations worldwide.
index.service_ocean_desc: FCL and LCL shipping solutions with optimized routing across all major trade lanes and port networks.
index.service_road_desc: Full truckload and groupage services with real-time GPS tracking across European corridors.
index.service_rail_desc: Cost-effective intermodal rail solutions connecting major European hubs with sustainable transport.
index.service_warehouse_desc: Strategic distribution centers with WMS technology, pick-and-pack services, and real-time inventory visibility.
index.service_customs_desc: Expert customs brokerage ensuring compliant, fast clearance at every border crossing point.
index.feature_1_desc: End-to-end shipment tracking with live GPS updates, milestone notifications, and predictive ETA calculations.
index.feature_2_desc: Strategic partnerships across 45+ countries with local expertise in every major logistics hub worldwide.
index.feature_3_desc: Named account managers with 24/7 availability, proactive issue resolution, and monthly performance reviews.
index.feature_4_desc: ISO 9001, GDP, AEO certified operations ensuring the highest standards of quality and security throughout.
index.numbers_desc: Every metric tells a story of reliability, growth, and the trust our clients place in us every day.
index.tracking_desc: Enter your tracking number below to get instant status updates, location data, and estimated delivery windows.

contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us about your logistics needs...
contact.info_desc: Get in touch with our team — we're available around the clock.

services.main_desc: Comprehensive logistics ecosystem tailored for modern supply chains
services.service_courier_desc: Fast, secure, and reliable delivery of documents and parcels. Same-day or next-day delivery with full tracking and professional handling — nationwide coverage.
services.service_express_desc: Urgent shipment? Our express service ensures immediate pickup and direct delivery without delays. Priority handling 24/7 dedicated fleet.
services.service_storage_desc: Smart warehousing with inventory management, cross-docking, and just-in-time distribution. Secure facilities with 24/7 surveillance.
services.service_national_desc: Efficient distribution across the Netherlands with optimized routes and reliable delivery times. Full visibility through digital control tower.
services.service_international_desc: Seamless cross-border shipping across Europe with customs support and fast transit times. Air, sea & rail combined expertise.
services.service_car_desc: Safe and professional vehicle transport for individuals and businesses across Europe. Enclosed carriers, real-time tracking, and full insurance coverage.

whoweare.about_desc_1: A modern logistics company delivering reliable solutions across borders. We specialise in pharmaceutical and clinical trial supply chains, built on a foundation of precision, speed, and trust.
whoweare.mission_desc: We are committed to delivering excellence in every shipment — combining cutting-edge technology, regulatory compliance, and a dedicated team to ensure your cargo arrives safely, on time, every time.
whoweare.vision_title: To be Europe's most trusted logistics partner
whoweare.vision_desc: Our vision is to be the most trusted logistics partner in Europe — continuously expanding our network, investing in innovation, and setting new standards in pharmaceutical supply chain management.
whoweare.experience_desc_1: With over 25 years of expertise in logistics and transport, Aasirko Global has developed a deep understanding of complex supply chains — from last-mile delivery to intercontinental freight management.
whoweare.timeline_1999_desc: Established as a regional freight forwarder with a focus on Benelux markets.
whoweare.timeline_2008_desc: Developed specialised cold-chain and GDP-compliant distribution services.
whoweare.timeline_2016_desc: Strategic hubs in Germany and Luxembourg to serve the broader European market.
whoweare.timeline_today_desc: 500+ clients across 12 countries, with a 99% on-time delivery rate.
whoweare.whyus_desc: Speed, reliability, and customer focus are not just words — they are the pillars of everything we do at Aasirko Global.
whoweare.feature_1_desc: We guarantee on-time delivery across all our European routes, backed by real-time tracking and proactive communication at every step.
whoweare.feature_2_desc: Fully compliant with Good Distribution Practice standards, ensuring pharmaceutical and clinical cargo is handled with the highest level of care.
whoweare.feature_3_desc: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock in both English and Dutch to assist with any logistics challenge you face.
whoweare.feature_4_desc: Every client gets a dedicated account manager who understands your business and provides personalised logistics solutions tailored to your needs.

career.intro_desc: Join a team of passionate logistics professionals working together to move the world forward. We're always looking for talented people.

global.hero_desc: We continue to use our logistical strength to expand our presence across the
global.hero_desc_2: Our Western European hub ensures fast, secure, and efficient distribution to areas where clinical trials and patient populations are increasing. It is all about location. We welcome you to explore our network to reach your patients faster.
global.network_desc: With strategic hubs in Europe, the Middle East, Asia, and Africa we offer truly global logistics reach.
global.country_nl_desc: Our Dutch operations form the backbone of our European logistics. With access to Rotterdam — Europe's largest port — we ensure rapid, reliable nationwide distribution and seamless international connections.
global.country_be_desc: Belgium's central position in Western Europe makes it a critical node in our network. We deliver reliably across all Belgian regions and leverage its infrastructure to connect neighbouring markets with speed and precision.
global.country_lu_desc: Luxembourg serves as a vital strategic hub within our network. Its prime location at the crossroads of France, Belgium, and Germany enables swift and efficient distribution throughout the region.
global.country_de_desc: Germany's extensive road, rail, and air network amplifies our reach across Central Europe. Our German operations ensure consistent delivery performance and support time-sensitive pharmaceutical logistics at scale.
global.country_we_desc: Beyond our core markets, Aasirko Global maintains broad Western European coverage. Our flexible logistics model adapts to the unique demands of each territory, ensuring no patient population is out of reach.
global.country_partners_desc: Our vetted network of international partners extends our capabilities beyond Europe. Through these alliances, we maintain end-to-end supply chain integrity and offer seamless global reach for clinical trial logistics worldwide.
global.cta_desc: Let our global network work for your business.

industrySolutions.main_desc: Tailored logistics solutions for your specific industry needs
industrySolutions.card_automotive_desc: Transport of vehicles and automotive parts
industrySolutions.card_healthcare_desc: Reliable distribution for retail and bulk goods
industrySolutions.card_tech_desc: Fast and flexible delivery for private customers
industrySolutions.cta_desc: Tell us about your sector and we'll build the right solution for you.

knowlageHup.advice_desc: Navigate complex supply chains with our expert advisory. From tax optimization to cross-border regulations, we ensure your business stays ahead of the curve.
knowlageHup.customs_desc: Our team provides in-depth analysis of EU customs regulations and international trade laws. We help you minimize delays and avoid costly penalties through proactive documentation management and regulatory foresight.
knowlageHup.supply_chain_desc: Reduce operational overhead by leveraging our network design tools. We analyze your current shipping lanes and inventory levels to recommend high-performance routes that decrease transit times by up to 15%.
knowlageHup.tax_desc: Specialized guidance for Arabic-speaking entrepreneurs entering the EU market. We offer VAT registration support, tax-efficient structuring, and corporate financial planning tailored to the logistics industry.
knowlageHup.news_featured_title: Supply Chain Operational Update: Middle East
knowlageHup.news_article_1_title: Solving The Global Aviation Parts Crisis
knowlageHup.news_article_2_title: Safeguarding Client Samples During Power Outage

getaquote.calc_desc: Select your service type and fill in the key details for a quick estimate.
getaquote.placeholder_special_req: e.g. temperature range, ADR class, tail-lift required, insurance needed...
getaquote.estimate_fill_form: Fill in the form to get your estimate
getaquote.courier_desc: Choose your courier service and book in just a few clicks. Available across the Netherlands, Belgium, Germany and Luxembourg.
getaquote.courier_same_day_desc: Urgent shipments collected and delivered on the same working day. Local & regional coverage.
getaquote.courier_express_desc: Guaranteed next-business-day delivery across Benelux and Germany with full tracking.
getaquote.courier_economy_desc: Cost-effective parcel delivery in 3–5 working days. Ideal for non-urgent shipments.
getaquote.step_1_desc: Enter your origin, destination, cargo details, and service preference in our quick form above.
getaquote.step_2_desc: Our specialists review your requirements and prepare a tailored, transparent price quote within 1 hour.
getaquote.step_3_desc: Accept the quote, confirm your pickup date and we handle all the logistics from there.
getaquote.step_4_desc: Monitor your shipment every step of the way via our Track & Trace portal with live updates.
getaquote.cta_desc: Get your free quote today — no commitment required.

career.intro_desc: We are always looking for passionate, driven professionals to join Aasirko Global. Whether you are an experienced logistics expert or just starting your career, there is a place for you in our team.
career.drivers_desc: We are actively recruiting professional drivers for our transport services across the Netherlands, Belgium, Germany and Luxembourg. If you hold a valid CE or BE licence, we want to hear from you.
career.drivers_req_1: Valid CE or BE driving licence
career.drivers_req_4: Good command of English or Dutch
career.partner_desc: We are open to strategic partnerships with logistics companies, transport owners, and service providers who share our commitment to reliability and quality.
career.partner_card_1_desc: Own a truck or small fleet? Partner with us for consistent loads across Western Europe.
career.partner_card_2_desc: Looking to expand your European reach? Join our trusted subcontractor network.
career.partner_card_3_desc: Own warehouse facilities in our key markets? Let's work together.
career.application_desc: Don't see a suitable vacancy? Send us your open application and CV. We are always growing and will keep your details on file for upcoming opportunities.
career.form_message_placeholder: Tell us about yourself and your experience...
career.cta_desc: Take the next step in your logistics career with Aasirko Global.

contact.info_desc: We are always looking for ways to improve our services. Contact us and let us know how we can help you.
